items.headline: Falcons sweep FURIA 3-0 to win the IEM Cologne Major — m0NESY MVP, NiKo's first Major
items.body: Team Falcons completed a miracle playoff run (Vitality, Spirit, then FURIA) to win the IEM Cologne Major 2026 with a clean 3-0 sweep in the grand final — the org's first CS2 Major. Sniper m0NESY took MVP, and legend NiKo finally lifted a Major trophy.
items.say: Did you catch the Cologne Major final? Falcons just three-zero'd FURIA and m0NESY went nuclear for MVP.

items.headline: Spain crush Saudi Arabia 4-0 as 18-year-old Lamine Yamal nets his first World Cup goal
items.body: Spain answered their critics with a dominant 4-0 win in Atlanta to seal a Round of 32 spot. Lamine Yamal slid home his maiden World Cup goal in the 10th minute, Mikel Oyarzabal grabbed a brace, and an own goal capped it.
items.say: Lamine Yamal finally got his first World Cup goal — Spain put four past Saudi Arabia like it was nothing.

links.text: FOX: Yamal's first World Cup goal

items.headline: USMNT into the knockout rounds with a game to spare
items.body: Riding a 2-0 win over Australia (after a 4-1 rout of Paraguay), the US punched its ticket to the Round of 32 — back-to-back World Cup wins for the first time since 1930. They close the group vs. Turkey on June 25.
items.say: Our guys are already through to the knockouts — first time the US has won back-to-back World Cup games since 1930.

items.headline: Second Wynd: Wyndham Clark holds on at Shinnecock for his 2nd US Open
items.body: Clark went wire-to-wire and survived a wobbly final round — nearly coughing up a six-shot lead before steadying for a one-stroke win at 4 under. Only three players broke par all week.
items.say: Wyndham Clark almost blew a six-shot lead but hung on to win his second US Open at Shinnecock.

items.headline: Toy Story 5 lassos a franchise-record $160M opening — biggest debut of 2026
items.body: Pixar's Toy Story 5 stormed to a $160M domestic opening ($312M worldwide), the biggest of the year, a franchise record, and the 2nd-largest animated debut ever. Woody and Buzz square off with a disruptive new tablet toy, Lilypad.
items.say: Toy Story 5 just had the biggest opening of the year — around a hundred-sixty million. Perfect Father's Day movie too.

items.headline: House of the Dragon Season 3 premieres tonight on HBO/HBO Max
items.body: The Targaryen civil war reignites: House of the Dragon S3 drops its first episode Sunday night at 9/8c on HBO and HBO Max, kicking off an eight-episode run. The final trailer teases all-out war and the Battle of the Gullet.
items.say: House of the Dragon season three starts tonight — perfect Father's Day couch plans if you ask me.

items.headline: NBA Draft tips off Tuesday — AJ Dybantsa the headline prospect
items.body: The 2026 NBA Draft starts Tuesday in Brooklyn, with Washington owning the No. 1 pick. BYU wing AJ Dybantsa headlines a loaded class alongside Darryn Peterson and Cameron Boozer — a week after the Knicks ended a 53-year title drought.
items.say: NBA Draft's Tuesday — everyone's watching where AJ Dybantsa lands. And the Knicks are still buzzing off that first title since '73.

items.headline: Hurricanes are Stanley Cup champions — first title in 20 years
items.body: Carolina shut out Vegas 3-0 in Game 6 to win the Cup 4-2, their first championship since 2006 and second in franchise history. Jordan Staal took the Conn Smythe; the Canes closed the playoffs a blistering 16-3.
items.say: Wild that the Hurricanes finally got the Cup again — first one in twenty years and they steamrolled the playoffs.
